## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally (lint + typecheck + build)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (failing test written first for new logic)
- [ ] Verified in the browser at `localhost:3000`
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env.local` untracked)
- [ ] `docs/ai/HANDOFF.md` status updated if a milestone completed
